description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this grey/blue shoe from catwalk is crafted with high quality material to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that stylish urban touch. Upper Synthetic leather upper with a covered toe for durability and style Lacing detail on toe and heel and topstitch decoration Slip on style for ease of wear Ergonomically curved and padded synthetic leather footbed with a stylish houndstooth fabric lining Outsole TPU outsole with floral pattern lugs for superior traction Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
